title: Snapshot Notification Lifecycle

flow: For each table: notifyTableInProgress() → status=IN_PROGRESS, current_collection_in_progress=<table>
[Optional chunked scan]: notifyTableChunkInProgress() → status=TABLE_CHUNK_IN_PROGRESS, chunk_index, total_chunks, total_rows_scanned
[Chunk done]: notifyCompletedTableChunkSuccessfully() → status=TABLE_CHUNK_COMPLETED, scanned_collection, chunk_index, total_chunks
[At any point, error path]: notifyAborted() → status=ABORTED
For each collection: notifyInProgress() → status=IN_PROGRESS, current_collection_in_progress, maximum_key, last_processed_key, data_collections
[Collection scan done]: notifyTableScanCompleted() → status=TABLE_SCAN_COMPLETED, scanned_collection, total_rows_scanned, status=<TableScanCompletionStatus>
[Abort - specific collections]: notifyAborted(context, dataCollectionIds) → status=ABORTED, data_collections=<csv>
incremental_snapshot_lifecycle.id_source: correlationId from IncrementalSnapshotContext (or random UUID fallback)

notification_dispatch_flow: ConnectChannel channels: channel.send(notification, offsets) — includes Partition+Offset in SourceRecord
notify(notification) [no offsets]: all enabled channels receive channel.send(notification) — ConnectChannel gets empty partition/offset
key_relationships: Notification built via Notification.Builder with: id, aggregateType, type(status), additionalData, timestamp
activity_branching_logic: Initial: chunked vs non-chunked path (chunk methods only called when connector splits tables into chunks)
Initial: success vs error path per table (notifyCompletedTableSuccessfully vs notifyCompletedTableWithError)
Initial: normal completion vs abort vs skip
Incremental: pause/resume cycle can happen mid-snapshot
Incremental: abort can target all collections or specific subset
Incremental: TABLE_SCAN_COMPLETED status carries TableScanCompletionStatus (EMPTY, NO_PRIMARY_KEY, SKIPPED, SQL_EXCEPTION, SUCCEEDED, UNKNOWN_SCHEMA)
Channel dispatch: ConnectChannel vs plain NotificationChannel branching in notify()
important_notes: NotificationService.stop() closes all enabled channels. Both sub-services are instantiated with Clock.systemUTC(). Channels initialized via channel.init(config); ConnectChannels additionally via initConnectChannel(schemaFactory, consumer). enabledChannels controls which channels are active at runtime.
